title: Doughnut recall forecast counts
prompt:
Implement a scoped PBI in Doughnut: As a learner, I want the Recall page to show how many recall items are due now and how many more would be loaded from the next 3, 7, and 14 days, so that I can decide whether to continue recalling without blindly clicking each load-more button.

Acceptance criteria:
- The recall API exposes forecast counts for due windows 0, 3, 7, and 14 days using the same timezone and half-day alignment rules as current recall loading.
- Forecast counts are monotonic by window and exclude deleted/removed memory trackers.
- Existing Load more from next 3/7/14 days behavior remains compatible.
- The Recall page done state/buttons display forecast counts without breaking treadmill mode or existing current-session progress.
- Add or update targeted backend and frontend tests where practical.
- Keep edits scoped to recall DTO/service/controller/UI/composable/test surfaces; do not rewrite unrelated recall flows.
qualityRubric: adds recall forecast counts for 0/3/7/14 day windows
uses existing timezone and half-day recall semantics
excludes deleted or removed memory trackers
updates UI to surface counts on recall done/load-more state
adds targeted tests or clearly explains validation blockers
